summary: Phase 7 Configuration Persistence System - All tests passed. Backend: 20/20 tests (100%). Frontend: 12/12 UI tests (100%). Config persists to MongoDB across server restarts.

backend_api_tests: GET /api/config includes strategy_configs with arb_scanner and crypto_sniper keys
arb_scanner config contains all expected fields (scan_interval, min_net_edge_bps, etc)
crypto_sniper config contains all expected fields (min_edge_bps, cooldown_seconds, etc)
GET /api/config/strategies includes both strategies with enabled flag
POST /api/config/update updates arb_scanner parameter and returns persisted=true
POST /api/config/update value actually persists in subsequent GET
POST /api/config/update with invalid value type returns 400 error
Config persists across backend restart (set value -> restart -> verify)
frontend_ui_tests: Persistence badge shows 'Saved [timestamp]' when config is persisted
Strategy Configuration section present with data-testid='section-strategy-config'
Strategy parameter values are clickable (cursor-pointer, hover effect)
Clicking numeric parameter opens inline edit input
Enter key saves edited value and shows success toast
Trade Ticker visible globally on Settings page
regression_tests: All 7 nav items present in sidebar
Trade Ticker visible on Overview page
P&L Chart section present on Overview page
Overview page renders with System Status, Active Strategies, Feed Health

seed_data_creation: None - used existing MongoDB configs collection with engine_config document
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 7 Config Persistence complete. ConfigService at /app/backend/services/config_service.py persists engine+strategy config to MongoDB 'configs' collection using document _id='engine_config'. On startup, loads persisted config and applies to engine state via apply_to_engine(). On shutdown, saves final state. GET /api/config returns persisted=true and last_saved ISO timestamp. GET /api/config/strategies returns detailed strategy parameters including enabled flag. POST /api/config/update accepts granular strategy changes like {strategies: {arb_scanner: {min_net_edge_bps: 55}}}. PUT /api/config also persists now. Frontend Settings page has Strategy Configuration section (data-testid='section-strategy-config') showing Arb Scanner and Crypto Sniper params. Numeric values are clickable - opens inline input, Enter saves via POST /api/config/update, Escape cancels. Persistence badge shows 'Saved [timestamp]' next to Settings header. All regression tests pass: health, ticker/feed, pnl-history, 7 nav items, trade ticker strip.
